title: OAP Instrument Profile
description: A signed Instrument Profile returned by the Wallet operator for each registered payment instrument. Defined in RFC 0032 section 3.13.1.

instrument_id.description: Stable, opaque identifier for this instrument within the Wallet operator's system. MUST NOT contain raw card numbers or IBANs.

rail.description: The payment rail this instrument uses.

currency.description: ISO 4217 code or registered OAP Currency Registry symbol for the instrument's primary currency.

current_balance.description: Available balance as a decimal string. Null for credit instruments.

credit_limit.description: Credit limit for credit instruments. Null for debit instruments.

available_credit.description: Current available credit. Null for debit instruments.

cashback_rate.description: Cashback rate as a decimal fraction (e.g., '0.015' for 1.5%).

annual_fee.description: Annual fee in the instrument's primary currency.

preferred_categories.description: Merchant categories for which this instrument provides optimal terms (cashback, points, insurance).

blocked_categories.description: Merchant categories this instrument cannot be used for.

fx_surcharge_bps.description: Foreign exchange surcharge in basis points applied to non-primary-currency transactions.

foreign_transaction_fee_bps.description: Additional foreign transaction fee in basis points.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last refresh from the underlying payment network. MUST be within 60 seconds of the Session creation request.

signature.description: Ed25519 signature of the Wallet operator over the canonical JSON body of this profile.
